## Verification

- [ ] Focused unit/component tests pass
- [ ] Required integration tests pass
- [ ] Required property tests pass
- [ ] Required BDD scenarios pass
- [ ] Required browser/end-to-end tests pass
- [ ] Full deterministic verification passes
- [ ] No required test is skipped, quarantined, flaky, or retried without explanation

## Evidence

- Verification manifest:
- CI run:
- Curated evidence directory:

Visual evidence:

- [ ] Applicable and attached below
- [ ] Not applicable; reason:

For a visible change, include actual product screenshots at desktop and narrow viewports, relevant empty/error states, alt text, captions, source commit, capture date, and provenance. For browser automation, include a trace or recording paired with deterministic recorder evidence. For a state change, include before and after.

## Safety and truthfulness

- [ ] Uses only fictional test data and reserved domains
- [ ] Contains no credentials, tokens, personal paths, private agreements, or real-vendor accusations
- [ ] Model output is not used as ground truth
- [ ] Unknown, untested, invisible, and needs-review states remain explicit
- [ ] Automation cannot create or restore APPROVED
- [ ] Product and documentation claims match the attached evidence

## Traceability and completion

- [ ] PRD-to-task-to-test-to-evidence mapping is updated
- [ ] Applicable documentation and visuals are updated
- [ ] P1 work is either passing or explicitly deferred
- [ ] Remaining limitations and unvalidated claims are listed below

Remaining work or limitations:
